subcodes.title: Words spoken in Dec. 1912 in London
subcodes.first_line: God, the Almighty, is the Creator. His Highness, the Divine God, has certain attributes. In thinking of God, one presupposes certain virtues
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @God's attributes require the existence of objects, @literal interpretation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
